description: Build palette catalog for ECS simulation engine Build Mode (WP-3.1.D). Categories: Structural, Furniture, Props, NamedAnchor.

entries.label: Wall (1x1)
entries.tooltip: Single-tile solid wall. Blocks movement and line of sight.

entries.label: Wall (2x1)
entries.tooltip: Two-tile wall segment. Efficient for long runs.

entries.label: Door (Single)
entries.tooltip: Single door. Can be locked via right-click. Pathfinding respects locked state.

entries.label: Door (Double)
entries.tooltip: Double-wide door. Used for conference rooms and large passages.

entries.label: Cubicle Desk
entries.tooltip: Standard cubicle desk. NPCs claim desks as work anchors per their schedule.

entries.label: Manager Desk
entries.tooltip: Larger desk, higher prestige. The Manager archetype prefers this.

entries.label: Conference Table
entries.tooltip: 2x4 conference table. NPCs can gather around it for meeting schedule blocks.

entries.label: Rolling Chair
entries.tooltip: Standard desk chair. Moveable.

entries.label: Stationary Chair
entries.tooltip: Non-rolling chair for meeting rooms and waiting areas.

entries.label: Lounge Chair
entries.tooltip: Soft lounge chair. Raises comfort drive when an NPC rests here.

entries.label: Phone
entries.tooltip: Desk phone. NPCs use it for calls per their schedule.

entries.label: Computer
entries.tooltip: Desktop computer. Required for certain task archetypes.

entries.label: Desk Lamp
entries.tooltip: Warm desk lamp. Adds a LightSourceComponent with warm-yellow color temp.

entries.label: Floor Fan
entries.tooltip: Oscillating fan. Mildly reduces heat stress in adjacent tiles.

entries.label: File Cabinet
entries.tooltip: 4-drawer file cabinet. Blocks movement.

entries.label: Plant
entries.tooltip: Office plant. Subtle positive mood effect for adjacent NPCs.

entries.label: Picture Frame
entries.tooltip: Wall decoration. NPCs may comment on it.

entries.label: Water Cooler
entries.tooltip: Water cooler. Raises Hydration drive satisfaction. Gossip hotspot.

entries.label: Microwave
entries.tooltip: The office microwave. Exactly one per office. Move-only if already placed.

entries.label: Fridge
entries.tooltip: The breakroom fridge. Exactly one per office. Move-only if already placed.
